subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Now present in the dwelling of His Honour Zayn, no sooner didst thou enter than mention was made of that handmaid of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله الان در کاشانه جناب زین حاضر و بمجرد دخول ذکر آن امة الله را از
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
